---
title: "nitrix.stats.gaulss"
generated: true
signature-hash: 7d872a2e15dece35
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.gaulss`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `q` | random-effect columns |
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `GauLSSResult` {#GauLSSResult}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GauLSSResult -->
```python
class GauLSSResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:GauLSSResult -->
Per-element Gaussian location-scale fit output.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GauLSSResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(coef_mu: Float[Array, 'V p'], coef_scale: Float[Array, 'V q'], cov_mu: Float[Array, 'V p p'], cov_scale: Float[Array, 'V q q'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], n_obs: int) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `gaulss_fit` {#gaulss_fit}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gaulss_fit -->
```python
gaulss_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, scale_design: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']] = None, n_iter: int = 50, ridge: float = 1e-08, block: Optional[int] = None) -> GauLSSResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gaulss_fit -->
Mass-univariate Gaussian location-scale regression (`gaulss`).

Fits, per element, `y_v ~ N(mu, sigma^2)` with `mu = X beta_mu` and
`log sigma = Z beta_scale` -- modelling heteroscedasticity directly -- by
joint Fisher scoring.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gaulss_fit -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `Y` | `Float` | `V` × `N` | — | `(V, N)` responses. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` mean-model design (shared; carries its own intercept). |
| `scale_design` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]` | — | `None` | `(N, q)` log-scale design `Z` (shared). Defaults to an intercept-only column -- a constant variance (the homoscedastic Gaussian, recovering OLS for the mean); pass a design to model the variance. |
| `n_iter` | `int` | — | `50` | Fisher-scoring iterations (default `50`). |
| `ridge` | `float` | — | `1e-08` | Small stabiliser on the normal equations. |
| `block` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Optional element-block size bounding peak memory. |

**Returns** `GauLSSResult`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `gaulss_predict` {#gaulss_predict}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gaulss_predict -->
```python
gaulss_predict(result: GauLSSResult, X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, scale_design: Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']] = None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V N'], Float[Array, 'V N']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gaulss_predict -->
Per-element Gaussian location-scale prediction on a (new) design.

Returns the **pair** `(mean, scale)` -- the heteroscedastic point of the
model -- on the new covariates: the mean `mu = X beta_mu` (identity link)
and the standard deviation `sigma = exp(Z beta_scale)` (log link).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gaulss_predict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `result` | `GauLSSResult` | — | — | A :class:`GauLSSResult` from :func:`gaulss_fit`. |
| `X` | `Float` | `N` × `p` | — | `(N, p)` mean-model design (same columns as the fit). |
| `scale_design` | `Optional[Float[Array, 'N q']]` | — | `None` | `(N, q)` scale-model design; `None` (default) uses an intercept column `(N, 1)` -- the homoscedastic default matching `gaulss_fit`. Must have the same column count `q` the fit's scale model used. |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'V N'], Float[Array, 'V N']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
